# F5

> **Researched 2026-06-28.** Primary category: [ai-gateway](../categories/ai-gateway.md). F5 is the **acquirer** of [calypsoai](calypsoai.md) (not itself acquired — the seed stub mislabeled this).

**One-liner** — The incumbent application-delivery / load-balancer vendor now bolting AI runtime security and "AI guardrails" onto its traffic platform, anchored by its 2025 acquisition of [calypsoai](calypsoai.md).

## What it does
F5 is a long-established public company (NASDAQ: FFIV) best known for load balancers, application delivery controllers (BIG-IP), and more recently a broader Application Delivery and Security Platform (ADSP) spanning WAF, API security, bot defense, and multicloud networking. Because F5 already sits inline on enterprise application traffic, its AI play is to inspect and control AI/model traffic on the same data path. After acquiring [calypsoai](calypsoai.md) it launched **F5 AI Guardrails** (model-agnostic runtime security for AI models and agents — data security, adversarial-threat defense, AI governance) and **F5 AI Red Team** (autonomous-agent attack simulation, advertised as >10,000 new attack patterns/month).

## Where it sits in the stack
Primary [ai-gateway](../categories/ai-gateway.md) (single controlled exit/inspection point for model traffic) and [ai-runtime-security](../categories/ai-runtime-security.md) (the AI firewall function from CalypsoAI). Layer: model-prompt. Lethal-trifecta role: as an inline inspection point it can address all three legs — screening **untrusted input** (prompt injection), catching **sensitive-data** exfiltration in prompts/responses, and constraining **egress** of model traffic. Lives at the boundary between green (internal) and red (model/internet) zones.

## Deployment & architecture
F5 deploys as inline proxy / ADC (hardware, virtual, and SaaS/cloud), with API-based integration; CalypsoAI's guardrails are model-agnostic and front multiple proprietary and open-source models. Integrations center on the F5 ADSP (BIG-IP, F5 Distributed Cloud) plus standard enterprise plumbing (SIEM, IdP). The AI Guardrails / AI Red Team products are the inference-security layer of that platform.

## Positioning & differentiators
F5's pitch is "you already route your app traffic through us, so route and inspect your AI traffic through us too" — consolidation onto an existing inline chokepoint rather than a new standalone proxy. Versus pure-play AI firewalls ([witnessai](witnessai.md), [prompt-security](prompt-security.md), [lakera](lakera.md), [aim-security](aim-security.md), [prisma-airs](prisma-airs.md)), F5 leads with incumbency and an installed base; versus other infra giants making the same move ([cisco](cisco.md)/[cisco-ai-defense](cisco-ai-defense.md), [palo-alto-networks](palo-alto-networks.md)/[prisma-airs](prisma-airs.md), [cloudflare](cloudflare.md)), it is one of several network/app-delivery vendors absorbing an AI-security startup. Versus standalone [ai-gateway](../categories/ai-gateway.md) tools ([portkey](portkey.md), [litellm](litellm.md), [kong](kong.md)) it is heavier and security-led rather than developer-routing-led.

## Ownership, funding & M&A
**Public** (NASDAQ: FFIV), HQ Seattle, founded 1996. **Acquired [calypsoai](calypsoai.md)** for ~$180M in purchase consideration (primarily cash) — announced **2025-09-11**, completed **2025-10-08** (verified against F5's own press release/blog and corroborating press). This is the M&A the seed flag pointed at; the seed's framing of F5 as "acquired" was wrong — F5 is the buyer.

## CTO / hedge-fund lens
Day-1 in the sense that an AI gateway / runtime-inspection point is a baseline control, but for most funds F5 is relevant only if you are **already an F5/BIG-IP shop** and want to consolidate AI inspection onto existing infrastructure rather than buy a pure-play. SR 11-7 / model-risk angle is indirect (it's a control point, not a governance/documentation system). Fits larger, infrastructure-heavy enterprises; a 50-person fund with no F5 footprint would more likely reach for a SaaS gateway or its SASE vendor's built-in AI controls.

## Competitors / alternatives
[prisma-airs](prisma-airs.md), [cisco-ai-defense](cisco-ai-defense.md), [cloudflare](cloudflare.md), [witnessai](witnessai.md), [prompt-security](prompt-security.md), [lakera](lakera.md), [aim-security](aim-security.md), [portkey](portkey.md), [litellm](litellm.md), [kong](kong.md).

- Whether CalypsoAI's standalone product/brand persists or is fully absorbed into F5 ADSP.
- F5 financial detail (revenue/segment) not researched here — public filings if needed.
